Events from the year 1548 in France.

Incumbents

  • Monarch – Henry II[1]

Events

  • July 7 – A marriage treaty is signed between Scotland and France, whereby 5-year-old Mary, Queen of Scots, is betrothed to the future King Francis II of France.
  • August 7 – Mary, Queen of Scots, leaves for France.

Births

  • Catherine of Cleves
  • André Guijon

Deaths

References

  1. ^ Nolan, Cathal J. (2006). The Age of Wars of Religion, 1000-1650: An Encyclopedia of Global Warfare and Civilization. Greenwood Publishing Group. p. 391. ISBN 978-0-313-33733-8.
